headline_en: Agent infrastructure, evaluation rigor, and compute constraints dominated the day, with Claude and OpenAI updates converging on the same question: how to make increasingly capable AI systems reliable at scale.
headline_zh: 今天的主线是 agent 基础设施、评测严谨性和 compute 约束，Claude 与 OpenAI 的更新都指向同一个问题：如何让越来越强的 AI 系统可靠地规模化。

items.en: Claude announced that beginning July 20, Claude Fable 5 will be included in all Max and Team Premium plans at 50% of limits, while Pro and Team Standard users keep access via usage credits and receive a one-time $100 credit. The account framed the staged rollout as a capacity-management problem, saying demand for Fable was difficult to predict and that Anthropic is still investing in new capacity.
items.zh: Claude 宣布从 7 月 20 日起，Claude Fable 5 将以 50% limits 纳入所有 Max 和 Team Premium 计划；Pro 和 Team Standard 用户仍可通过 usage credits 使用，并获得一次性 $100 credit。官方把分阶段上线解释为 capacity 管理问题，称 Fable 需求很难预测，Anthropic 仍在继续投入新 capacity。

items.en: OpenAI Codex and ChatGPT engineer Thibault Sottiaux said paid users received reset usage limits for Codex and ChatGPT Work, crediting the team for scaling infrastructure under unusually fast growth. He also said GPT-5.6 Sol is “an extremely good model,” but offered no further technical details.
items.zh: OpenAI Codex 和 ChatGPT 工程师 Thibault Sottiaux 表示，Codex 与 ChatGPT Work 的付费用户 usage limits 已被重置，并把这归功于团队在高速增长下持续扩展 infra。他还称 GPT-5.6 Sol 是 “an extremely good model”，但没有给出更多技术细节。

items.en: Claude Code engineer Thariq argued that building small prototypes of mockups, schemas, data models, and proofs of concept is the best way to avoid spending large token budgets before discovering the desired output is wrong. The point is a practical agent-workflow lesson: make uncertain specifications executable early, then let the model iterate against something concrete.
items.zh: Claude Code 工程师 Thariq 认为，先做 mockup、schema、data model、proof of concept 等小型原型，是避免消耗大量 token 后才发现输出不对的最佳方式。这里的核心是一个实用的 agent workflow 经验：尽早把不确定的规格变成可执行对象，再让模型围绕具体产物迭代。

items.title: Scaling Managed Agents: Decoupling the brain from the hands
items.en: Anthropic Engineering: Scaling Managed Agents argues that long-running agents need OS-like abstractions that survive changing model behavior. Managed Agents split the “brain” (Claude plus harness), “hands” (sandboxes and tools), and “session” (durable event log), so each can fail, restart, or be swapped independently. The design improves reliability, security, and deployment flexibility: credentials stay out of sandboxes, sessions persist outside context windows, and customer resources can live in private infrastructure. The most concrete payoff is latency: decoupling containers from the harness reduced p50 time-to-first-token by roughly 60% and p95 by over 90%.
items.zh: Anthropic Engineering: Scaling Managed Agents 认为，长时间运行的 agent 需要类似 OS 的抽象，才能适应不断变化的模型行为。Managed Agents 将 “brain” 即 Claude 与 harness、“hands” 即 sandboxes 与 tools，以及 “session” 即持久 event log 分离，让每一层都能独立失败、重启或替换。这种设计提升了可靠性、安全性和部署灵活性：credentials 不进入 sandbox，session 持久化在 context window 之外，客户资源也可以留在私有基础设施中。最具体的收益是延迟：将 container 与 harness 解耦后，p50 time-to-first-token 下降约 60%，p95 下降超过 90%。

items.title: New in Claude Managed Agents: self-hosted sandboxes and MCP tunnels
items.en: Claude Blog: New in Claude Managed Agents adds self-hosted sandboxes in public beta and MCP tunnels in research preview. Enterprises can now run agent tool execution inside their own infrastructure or managed providers such as Cloudflare, Daytona, Modal, or Vercel, while Anthropic keeps the orchestration loop, context management, and error recovery on Claude Platform. MCP tunnels let Claude Managed Agents and the Messages API reach private MCP servers through a lightweight outbound gateway, avoiding public endpoints or inbound firewall rules. The practical implication is clearer enterprise deployment: files, repositories, internal APIs, databases, and security controls can stay inside the customer perimeter while agents still call them as tools.
items.zh: Claude Blog: New in Claude Managed Agents 推出了 public beta 的 self-hosted sandboxes，以及 research preview 的 MCP tunnels。企业现在可以把 agent 的 tool execution 放在自己的基础设施中，或使用 Cloudflare、Daytona、Modal、Vercel 等 managed providers，同时由 Anthropic 在 Claude Platform 上负责 orchestration loop、context management 和 error recovery。MCP tunnels 让 Claude Managed Agents 和 Messages API 通过轻量 outbound gateway 访问私有 MCP servers，避免公开 endpoint 或 inbound firewall rules。实际意义是企业部署路径更清晰：files、repositories、internal APIs、databases 和安全控制都可以留在客户 perimeter 内，同时 agents 仍能把它们作为 tools 调用。

items.title: An update on recent Claude Code quality reports
items.en: Anthropic Engineering: An update on recent Claude Code quality reports explains three separate regressions behind user reports that Claude Code had worsened; Anthropic says the API was unaffected and all issues were resolved by April 20 in v2.1.116. The causes were a default reasoning-effort change from high to medium, a caching bug that repeatedly dropped older thinking after idle sessions, and a verbosity-reduction system prompt that produced a measured 3% drop in one broader eval. Anthropic reverted the effort default, fixed the thinking-history bug, and reverted the prompt change, then reset usage limits for all subscribers. The post is most useful as a concrete failure case in agent-product evals: internal usage and evals initially failed to reproduce the regressions, so Anthropic is adding broader per-model evals, ablations, soak periods, gradual rollouts, and tighter prompt-change auditing.
items.zh: Anthropic Engineering: An update on recent Claude Code quality reports 解释了用户反馈 Claude Code 变差背后的三个独立 regression；Anthropic 称 API 未受影响，所有问题已在 4 月 20 日的 v2.1.116 中解决。原因包括默认 reasoning effort 从 high 改为 medium、一个会在 idle session 后反复丢弃旧 thinking 的 caching bug，以及一条降低 verbosity 的 system prompt 在更广 eval 中带来 3% drop。Anthropic 已回滚 effort 默认值，修复 thinking-history bug，回滚 prompt change，并为所有订阅用户重置 usage limits。它最有价值的地方在于提供了一个 agent product eval 的具体失败案例：内部使用和 evals 一开始没有复现 regressions，因此 Anthropic 将加入更广的 per-model evals、ablations、soak periods、gradual rollouts 和更严格的 prompt-change auditing。

items.source: The MAD Podcast with Matt Turck
items.title: OpenAI’s Compute Chief: We Can’t Build Fast Enough | Sachin Katti
items.en: The Takeaway: OpenAI’s compute strategy is no longer just buying GPUs; it is a full-stack industrial buildout across data centers, power, networking, custom silicon, and guaranteed token capacity. Sachin Katti, OpenAI’s head of industrial compute, describes AI data centers as “giant factories that are turning electrons into tokens,” and says demand still far exceeds supply: “Anything we can bring online, we consume immediately.” The strategic reason for Jalapeno, OpenAI’s custom chip effort, is workload co-design: OpenAI knows the models and inference mix it needs to serve, so it can optimize for tokens per watt in a power-constrained world. Katti’s most important claim is recursive acceleration: AI already helps chip design, AI research consumes more inference through synthetic data and test-time compute, and OpenAI expects a world where AI designs systems needed to train and run the next generation of AI.
items.zh: The Takeaway: OpenAI 的 compute strategy 已经不只是买 GPU，而是覆盖 data centers、power、networking、custom silicon 和 guaranteed token capacity 的全栈工业化建设。OpenAI head of industrial compute Sachin Katti 把 AI data centers 称为 “giant factories that are turning electrons into tokens”，并表示需求仍远超供应：“Anything we can bring online, we consume immediately.” Jalapeno 这个 OpenAI custom chip 项目的战略理由是 workload co-design：OpenAI 知道自己要服务的 models 和 inference mix，因此可以在 power 受限的世界里优化 tokens per watt。Katti 最重要的判断是 recursive acceleration：AI 已经在帮助 chip design，AI research 通过 synthetic data 和 test-time compute 消耗越来越多 inference，OpenAI 预期 AI 将设计训练和运行下一代 AI 所需的系统。

items.title: Eta Given Delta: Defining LLM Tool Efficiency With Marginal Tool Utility
items.en: This paper proposes direct metrics for LLM agent tool-use efficiency: tool efficiency and marginal tool utility. Instead of using task accuracy as a proxy, it asks whether each tool call in a trajectory actually contributed and estimates that post hoc with LLM-as-a-Judge. For agent builders, the value is a cleaner evaluation target for pruning bloated tool suites and designing harnesses that are accurate without wasting calls.
items.zh: 这篇论文提出了直接衡量 LLM agent tool-use efficiency 的指标：tool efficiency 和 marginal tool utility。它不再用 task accuracy 间接代理效率，而是追问 trajectory 中每一次 tool call 是否真的有贡献，并用 LLM-as-a-Judge 做事后估计。对 agent builder 来说，它的价值在于给精简臃肿 tool suites、设计既准确又不浪费调用的 harness 提供了更清晰的 evaluation target。

items.title: AI Agents Do Not Fail Alone:The Context Fails First
items.en: This paper treats context engineering as a measurable leading indicator of agent reliability, not just a prompt-design craft. ProofAgent-Harness scores context on role clarity, guardrails, instruction consistency, tool schema quality, grounding, injection hardening, and token efficiency, then validates those scores against behavior while holding the agent fixed. The result matters because it gives teams a way to detect likely hallucination, tool misuse, and instruction-following failures before shipping an agent.
items.zh: 这篇论文把 context engineering 视为 agent reliability 的可测领先指标，而不只是 prompt-design 手艺。ProofAgent-Harness 从 role clarity、guardrails、instruction consistency、tool schema quality、grounding、injection hardening 和 token efficiency 等维度给 context 打分，并在固定 agent 的情况下验证这些分数与行为结果的关系。它的重要性在于给团队提供了一种在 agent 上线前发现 hallucination、tool misuse 和 instruction-following failure 风险的方法。

items.title: MemoHarness: Agent Harnesses That Learn from Experience
items.en: MemoHarness frames the agent harness itself as something that can learn from prior executions. It decomposes harness behavior into six editable control dimensions, stores case-level diagnoses plus global patterns in an experience bank, and retrieves that experience at test time without labels or extra search. This is relevant for anyone building production agents because it moves adaptation outside model weights while preserving a path to case-specific behavior.
items.zh: MemoHarness 把 agent harness 本身视为可以从过往执行中学习的对象。它把 harness 行为拆成六个可编辑的 control dimensions，把 case-level diagnoses 和 global patterns 存入 experience bank，并在 test time 无需 labels 或额外 search 就检索这些经验。对生产级 agent 构建者来说，这很相关，因为它把 adaptation 放在 model weights 之外，同时保留了针对具体 case 调整行为的路径。

items.title: Bad Memory: Evaluating Prompt Injection Risks from Memory in Agentic Systems
items.en: Bad Memory studies prompt injection risks introduced by persistent memory in agentic systems. In sandboxed evaluations of Claude Code and OpenAI Codex across Claude Haiku 4.5, Claude Opus 4.7, GPT-5.2, and GPT-5.5, the authors find that planted payloads in memory files can attack current and future sessions even if agents are harder to trick into overwriting memory from untrusted content. The result sharpens the threat model for agent memory: protecting memory writes is necessary but not sufficient if memory reads remain trusted by default.
items.zh: Bad Memory 研究了 agentic systems 中 persistent memory 带来的 prompt injection 风险。作者在 sandboxed evaluations 中测试 Claude Code 和 OpenAI Codex，以及 Claude Haiku 4.5、Claude Opus 4.7、GPT-5.2、GPT-5.5，发现已经植入 memory files 的 payload 可以攻击当前和未来 sessions，即使诱导 agent 从不可信内容覆写 memory 本身更困难。这个结果让 agent memory 的 threat model 更清晰：保护 memory writes 是必要的，但如果 memory reads 默认可信，仍然不够。

items.title: Value Leakage: An LLM's Answers Are Silently Shaped by Its Own Values
items.en: This paper identifies covert value leakage, where a model’s answers are shaped by its own values without disclosure to the user. The authors introduce evaluations showing effects from moral preferences, developer-company preferences, and other value choices, including a case where Claude Opus 4.8 gives different AI-bubble estimates depending on whether Anthropic or OpenAI is named. For alignment researchers, the important distinction is that this failure mode is neither standard sycophancy nor reward hacking, and current evals may miss it.
items.zh: 这篇论文提出 covert value leakage：模型的回答会被自身 values 悄悄影响，但不会向用户披露。作者构建了一组 evaluations，展示 moral preferences、开发公司偏好及其他 value choices 的影响，其中包括 Claude Opus 4.8 在问题中提到 Anthropic 或 OpenAI 时给出不同 AI bubble 估计的案例。对 alignment 研究者而言，关键在于它不同于常规 sycophancy 或 reward hacking，而且当前 evals 可能无法覆盖这种 failure mode。

items.title: Non-vacuous Generalization Bounds for Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards
items.en: This paper gives the first non-vacuous generalization bounds for parameter-efficient RLVR fine-tuning at billion-parameter scale. Its Progressive RLVR framework combines RLVR with on-policy distillation, TinyLoRA, and quantization, retaining 84-97% of standard LoRA performance while making models 14,796x more compressible. This matters because RLVR is now central to reasoning post-training, but its generalization behavior has been much less understood than its benchmark gains.
items.zh: 这篇论文给出了 billion-parameter scale 下 parameter-efficient RLVR fine-tuning 的首个 non-vacuous generalization bounds。它的 Progressive RLVR framework 将 RLVR、on-policy distillation、TinyLoRA 和 quantization 结合，在保留 standard LoRA 84-97% 性能的同时，让模型可压缩性提升 14,796x。这很重要，因为 RLVR 已成为 reasoning post-training 的核心方法之一，但相比 benchmark gains，它的 generalization 行为此前理解不足。

items.title: Controlled Reformulation Testing for Logical Consistency in Large Language Models
items.en: CRTBench tests whether LLMs give consistent answers across logically equivalent reformulations such as contrapositives, double negation, negation flipping, and passive voice. The headline result is the accuracy-consistency gap: GPT-5.4-mini reaches 98.9% base accuracy but only 60.3% family-level consistency, while o4-mini reaches 96.9% consistency. For reasoning evaluation, this is a useful reminder that high single-question accuracy can hide brittle logical invariance.
items.zh: CRTBench 测试 LLMs 在 contrapositive、double negation、negation flipping、passive voice 等逻辑等价改写下能否保持答案一致。核心结果是 accuracy-consistency gap：GPT-5.4-mini 的 base accuracy 达到 98.9%，但 family-level consistency 只有 60.3%，而 o4-mini 达到 96.9% consistency。对 reasoning evaluation 来说，这是一个重要提醒：单题高准确率可能掩盖脆弱的 logical invariance。

items.title: Can We Trust Item Response Theory for AI Evaluation?
items.en: This paper stress-tests item response theory for AI benchmarks, where the data regime differs sharply from human testing: fewer models, many more items, and skewed or clustered capability distributions. Across 18,000 simulation conditions derived from six LLM benchmarks, it finds that classical estimators can become infeasible at scale while scalable estimators may produce unreliable rankings and item inferences. It is directly relevant to benchmark design because it asks when latent-trait modeling is actually trustworthy for model comparison.
items.zh: 这篇论文对 AI benchmarks 中使用 item response theory 做压力测试，因为这里的数据形态与人类考试很不同：模型更少、题目更多，capability distributions 也可能偏斜或聚类。基于六个 LLM benchmarks 派生的 18,000 个 simulation conditions，论文发现 classical estimators 在大规模设置下可能不可行，而 scalable estimators 又可能给出不可靠的 rankings 和 item inferences。它与 benchmark design 直接相关，因为它追问 latent-trait modeling 何时真的适合用于模型比较。

items.title: Simplicity Paradox: Debunking myths about prompting and datasets for LLM evaluation
items.en: This empirical study evaluates eight prompting techniques across 10 MCQA datasets, 27 model configurations, and over 430,000 runs. Contrary to the assumption that more elaborate reasoning prompts reliably help, baseline prompting often beats complex techniques, with only minimal expert or inductive role framing giving a small roughly 3-point gain. For practitioners, the paper is a useful antidote to prompt-method folklore and a reminder to measure cost, latency, and accuracy together.
items.zh: 这项实证研究在 10 个 MCQA datasets、27 个 model configurations 和超过 430,000 次运行上评估了 8 种 prompting techniques。结果反驳了复杂 reasoning prompts 必然更好的假设：baseline prompting 经常超过复杂技巧，只有 minimal expert 或 inductive role framing 带来约 3 个百分点的小幅提升。对 practitioners 来说，这篇论文是对 prompt-method folklore 的有用纠偏，也提醒大家要同时衡量 cost、latency 和 accuracy。

items.title: Why Git Is the Memory Solution for the Agentic Development Lifecycle
items.en: This paper argues that coding-agent memory should be bound to git rather than stored in separate memory machinery. It separates seed retrieval from answer assembly and reports that ungated episode injection can degrade otherwise good answers, while a router can choose between structural maps, gated episodes, and decision synthesis. The practical takeaway is strong: for software agents, commits and reviews already provide freshness, provenance, and verification that generic memory stores must recreate poorly.
items.zh: 这篇论文主张 coding-agent memory 应该绑定到 git，而不是放进独立的 memory machinery。它将 seed retrieval 与 answer assembly 分开，并报告 ungated episode injection 会拉低原本不错的答案，而 router 可以在 structural maps、gated episodes 和 decision synthesis 之间选择。实际 takeaway 很明确：对 software agents 来说，commits 和 reviews 已经提供 freshness、provenance 与 verification，而通用 memory stores 往往只能低质量地重建这些保证。

items.title: Contextualized Evaluation of Vision Language Models through Dynamic, Multi-turn Interactions
items.en: CEDI turns MLLM evaluation into a three-party dynamic interaction among an evaluatee model, automated examiner, and grader. Applied to visual hallucination, it finds that multi-turn contextual evaluation exposes more hallucinations than static benchmarks and reveals failures that accumulate through dialogue history, especially around premise rejection and refusal. This matters for agentic multimodal products because real failures often emerge only after context and user pressure build up.
items.zh: CEDI 将 MLLM evaluation 变成 evaluatee model、automated examiner 和 grader 之间的三方动态互动。应用在 visual hallucination 上时，它发现 multi-turn contextual evaluation 比 static benchmarks 暴露出更多 hallucinations，并揭示了会随着 dialogue history 累积的失败，尤其是在 premise rejection 和 refusal 相关问题上。它对 agentic multimodal products 很重要，因为真实失败常常只会在 context 和用户压力累积后出现。

items.title: Are LLM-Generated GPU Kernels Production-Ready? A Trace-Driven Benchmark and Optimization Agent
items.en: Atrex-Bench evaluates LLM-generated GPU kernels on 30 operators and 440 shapes sampled from production inference traces, weighted by actual GPU time. Six frontier coding agents perform poorly in vanilla form, with the best reaching only about 10% of the hardware roofline, and apparent correctness inflated by PyTorch fallbacks. The accompanying Atrex-Kernel-Agent uses profiling, iterative revision, optimization dropout, and a GPU knowledge base, making this especially relevant to AI infrastructure teams trying to turn coding agents into real performance tools.
items.zh: Atrex-Bench 使用来自 production inference traces 的 30 个 operators 和 440 个 shapes 来评估 LLM-generated GPU kernels，并按真实 GPU time 加权。六个 frontier coding agents 的 vanilla 表现很弱，最好也只有约 10% hardware roofline，而且表面 correctness 被 PyTorch fallbacks 抬高。配套的 Atrex-Kernel-Agent 使用 profiling、iterative revision、optimization dropout 和 GPU knowledge base，因此它对希望把 coding agents 变成真实性能工具的 AI infrastructure 团队尤其相关。

items.title: The Most Forbidden Technique is not always forbidden
items.en: LessWrong’s post pushes back on blanket objections to using model internals as training signals, using Goodfire’s Silico and RLFR as the immediate context. The author argues that “Most Forbidden Technique” concerns should not become a cached response to every probe-based reward method, and lays out conditions under which training on internals may be warranted. The key alignment distinction is between internals-based signals that incentivize obfuscation and probe-based signals that may be safer than chain-of-thought monitors when used carefully.
items.zh: LessWrong 这篇文章以 Goodfire 的 Silico 和 RLFR 为背景，反驳了对使用 model internals 作为 training signals 的一概反对。作者认为，“Most Forbidden Technique” 不应变成对所有 probe-based reward methods 的固定反应，并梳理了在哪些条件下基于 internals 的训练可能是合理的。关键 alignment 区分在于：哪些 internals-based signals 会激励 obfuscation，哪些 probe-based signals 在谨慎使用时可能比 chain-of-thought monitors 更安全。

items.title: Should we benchmark conceptual capabilities using judgment prediction tasks?
items.en: LessWrong’s benchmarking note asks whether subjective conceptual capabilities should be evaluated by having AIs predict a specified human expert’s judgment under defined affordances. The motivation is to measure progress on disagreement-heavy tasks without conflating model capability with the model’s own priors or taste. It is a useful eval-design idea for neglected conceptual reasoning tasks, though the author flags that judgment prediction may itself be an imperfect benchmark methodology.
items.zh: LessWrong 这篇 benchmarking note 讨论了一个思路：对于主观性很强的 conceptual capabilities，是否应让 AI 在明确 affordances 下预测某位指定人类专家的 judgment。其动机是在 disagreement-heavy tasks 上衡量能力进展，同时避免把模型能力与模型自身 priors 或 taste 混在一起。对被忽视的 conceptual reasoning tasks 来说，这是一个有用的 eval-design 思路，不过作者也指出 judgment prediction 本身可能并不是完美的 benchmark methodology。
